deliverables.description: Task-type-specific decomposition strategies (content, research, analysis, code_build, hybrid)
Plan generation logic that transforms interview synthesis into execution plans

findings: No decompose or generate_plan functions found in existing N5/pulse scripts
existing_work_check.conclusion: Both deliverables are new implementations, not duplications of existing work

decisions: Used strategy pattern with task-type-specific decomposition functions
Drops dataclass for structured plan representation
plan_generator.py orchestrates the full flow: load task → load synthesis → decompose → create build → write files → advance queue
Fixed queue status from 'planned' to 'planning' to match queue_manager valid statuses
notes_for_orchestrator: Plan generator integrates with existing queue_manager and interview_manager
Supports 5 task types: content, research, analysis, code_build, hybrid
Each task type has predefined drop patterns with stream-based parallelization
Generated drop briefs include frontmatter for thread spawning integration
Status flows: seeded → planning → plan_review (next stage)
